text.title: Google Ads Optimization Cycle Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-ads-optimization engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: target-CPA bidding set with 8 conv/mo; CPA fluctuates 5x; spend uncontrolled.
antipattern.root-cause: Smart bidding chosen without conversion floor.
antipattern.fix: Revert to manual CPC until ≥30 conv/mo, then maximize-conversions.

antipattern.symptom: Spend through 'free' / 'crack' / 'torrent' Search Terms creeps up.
antipattern.fix: Weekly 10-minute Search Terms review; add negatives same session.

antipattern.symptom: Bid raised 30% on QS-4 keyword; QS drops to 3; CPC keeps rising.
antipattern.fix: Fix QS first (ad group split / ad copy / LP); then re-evaluate bid.
